issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly handle error scenarios such as missing files or unsupported formats.
The skill is limited to Node.js 18+ and does not support other runtime environments.

scenarios.name: Extract dominant palette from landing page screenshot
scenarios.rationale: Baseline scripts color-thief or k-means clustering; treatment runs extract-colors.sh, consumes the JSON array (hex/rgb/hsl/area) sorted by prominence, and assigns the top entries to primary/accent/background as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Map Figma export colors into Tailwind theme.extend.colors
scenarios.rationale: Baseline picks colors by eyedropping or color-thief; treatment runs extract-colors.sh on the Figma jpg and translates the highest-area hex values directly into a theme.extend.colors block as documented.
